home.heroLead: The all-in-one operating platform for Fire, EMS, Emergency Management, and Public Safety agencies.
home.heroBody: Forge connects operations, reporting, personnel, training, prevention, fleet management, analytics, and command into a single mission-ready platform.
home.modulesTitle: Start Strong. Grow As You Go.
home.modulesDescription: Every agency gets a powerful base package. Add the modules that match your mission — no bloat, no paying for what you don't use.
home.productsDescription: Each Forge product is powerful on its own. Together, they're unstoppable.
home.whyTitle: Built By Responders. Built For Responders.
home.whyDescription: Developed from real-world fire service experience. Designed by those who understand the mission.

whyCards.title: Unified Operations
whyCards.copy: Eliminate the chaos of disconnected software systems. Forge brings every operational function into a single, coherent platform.

whyCards.title: Reliable By Design
whyCards.copy: Enterprise-grade infrastructure with secure cloud architecture. Built for 24/7 public safety operations where downtime is never an option.

whyCards.title: Actionable Intelligence
whyCards.copy: Transform operational data into meaningful decisions with real-time dashboards and analytics for every level of command.

home.closingDescription: See how Forge can unify your operations, reduce administrative burden, and give your crews the tools they need to focus on what matters most — the mission.
